purpose: Structured queue for recurring knowledge-base system issues that need diagnosis before repair closure.

execution_policy.closure_rule: A recurring issue is closed only after structured diagnosis, durable capture paths, validation reports and diagnosis acceptance are present.
execution_policy.constraint_rule: forbidden_pattern and quality_gate are kept for legacy records or explicit guardrail decisions, but new diagnosis records must first state the positive_model_repair and constraint_decision.
execution_policy.generalization_scan_rule: Captured system_upgrade issues from this issue onward must include generalization_scan so closure proves same-class assets and sibling surfaces were checked.
execution_policy.root_problem_rule: Captured system_upgrade issues from this issue onward must separate the observed incident from the root_problem and name the system_regulation_target before closure.
execution_policy.failure_learning_rule: Captured system_upgrade issues from this issue onward must decide whether the controlled failure-learning loop is opened, deferred or not_needed, with reason.

issues.title: Canvas 全局布局规则升级后未全量迁移现有画布资产
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出：右侧纵向导航栏规则是每一个图的通用要求，但上一轮只修改了 system/canvas-system.json、system/canvas-registry.json 和说明文档，没有同步更新所有相关 .canvas 文件。当前证据显示 canvas-directory-layout-map 的 parent-canvas-system-canvas 仍在 x=-940，domain-taxonomy-overview-map 的 back-to-navigation-index 仍在 x=-1120，未形成右侧独立纵向导航栏。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 用户反馈 -> 检查 canvas-registry current/active 结构图 -> 解析 navigation_nodes 坐标 -> kb-system、diagnostic-system、canvas-system 的导航节点在右侧；canvas-directory-layout 与 domain-taxonomy-overview 的返回节点仍在左侧 -> validate-canvas 仍通过，因为它只校验 JSON、登记、父子关系和文件节点存在，不校验视觉布局协议。
issues.upper_principle_track: 违反原则 1：没有从用户指出的现象继续追溯到所有受影响图。违反原则 2：系统升级必须协同，但规则升级只改了规则面，没有迁移资产面和校验面。违反原则 3：information map 与机器友好数据流虽然登记了 Canvas 系统，但缺少 rule-change-to-asset-migration 的机器执行门。
issues.failed_mindset: policy-only thinking: 把用户纠正理解为规则语义修正，而不是规则、现有资产、校验脚本、审查记录必须一起闭环的系统升级。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 系统缺少全局布局规则变更后的受影响视图枚举、资产迁移步骤和自动/半自动视觉布局校验；上一轮执行时也没有把 current/active 非导航结构图逐张列为修改对象。
issues.positive_rule: 任何 Canvas 全局布局规则变更，都必须先枚举所有 current/active 非导航结构图，逐张判断是否需要迁移 .canvas 坐标、导航节点和边；最后用校验或审查记录证明规则已落到资产。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 只修改 policy/registry/docs，然后用 validate-canvas 通过来代表视觉规则已经落实。
issues.quality_gate: 新增或升级 Canvas 全局视觉规则后，必须产出 affected_views 清单，并至少检查 navigation_nodes 是否符合右侧独立纵向导航栏规则；不符合的 current/active 图必须迁移或明确登记为待修复。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair upgraded diagnosis plus development principles into a higher-level diagnostic-upgrade-orchestration protocol, migrated the two non-compliant current Canvas assets to right-side navigation panels, and added a layout-aware validate-canvas gate so policy-only Canvas layout updates cannot silently pass.
issues.positive_model_repair: 任何 Canvas 全局布局规则变更，都必须先枚举所有 current/active 非导航结构图，逐张判断是否需要迁移 .canvas 坐标、导航节点和边；最后用校验或审查记录证明规则已落到资产。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 重要子系统文档缺少薄入口与文档地图，容易把规则混进单个文件
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出：系统里每个重要模块和子系统内部的基准文档或子 agents 文档，都要参考根 AGENTS.md 的规划方式，不能把规则、层级、边界和内部方法论混进一个文件；Canvas 子系统尤其会有很多文档层级和边界信息。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查现有文件发现：根 AGENTS.md 已是薄入口；module-governance 有 thin-entry-fat-route 原则；但 Canvas 文档仍散落在 docs/canvas-*.md 和 docs/obsidian-canvas-workflow.md，route-registry、information-map、canvas-registry、canvas-view-graph 和 .canvas file nodes 都直接引用这些扁平旧路径，缺少 Canvas 子系统自己的 docs map。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求遇到问题先诊断，不能只把当前文档改薄；原则 2 要求系统升级必须协同，文档结构变化要同步 route、information map、registry、Canvas 链接和校验；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，文档路由和文档边界也要有机器可读登记。
issues.failed_mindset: doc-file thinking: 把子系统文档当成普通 Markdown 文件管理，而不是当成会增长、需要边界和路由的系统表面。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 模块治理只规定了根入口薄层，但没有明确重要子系统的 baseline_doc、docs_map、doc route 和 thin-entry 校验；Canvas 子系统也没有 system/canvas-docs-map.json 来接管文档层级。
issues.positive_rule: 重要子系统一旦拥有多份说明、子 agent 文档、skill 入口、schema、workflow、Canvas 或校验，就必须采用薄基准文档加机器可读文档地图；具体规则拆到专题文件并登记路由。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 把架构、边界、操作、审查、校验和局部方法论持续塞进同一个 Markdown、README、SKILL 或子 agent 文档。
issues.quality_gate: validate-system 必须检查 Canvas docs map、baseline doc 是否薄、docs/canvas 下 Markdown 是否全部登记；系统路由和信息地图必须指向 docs map 与专题目录。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair created system/canvas-docs-map.json, moved Canvas human docs under docs/canvas/, added a thin docs/canvas/README.md, extracted view-boundary guidance, updated routes, information-map, Canvas registry/view graph, Obsidian Canvas file nodes and validate-system gates so subsystem documentation no longer depends on a single mixed Markdown file.
issues.positive_model_repair: 重要子系统一旦拥有多份说明、子 agent 文档、skill 入口、schema、workflow、Canvas 或校验，就必须采用薄基准文档加机器可读文档地图；具体规则拆到专题文件并登记路由。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 领域分类子系统文档与 loop 资产缺少薄入口和文档地图
issues.failure_packet: 用户要求检查系统其他模块是否也存在基准文档和子系统文档混放问题。诊断发现 domain-taxonomy-seed.md 同时承载机器真相指针、loop 状态、分类层级、字段模板、一级/二级基准和下钻入口；taxonomy-refinement loop 又有 queue、state、runs、outputs 和 45 份 summary，但缺少自己的薄入口与统一 docs map。
issues.lower_evidence_track: route-registry 的 domain-taxonomy 路由直接读取 seed、overview、routing guide 和 loop 文件；information-map 只登记 registry；seed.md 行数超过 100 且包含多个主题；overview.md 是 567 行派生总览；outputs/README.md 管 45 个 summary；validate-system 没有检查 taxonomy 文档地图或 seed 是否薄。
issues.upper_principle_track: 违反薄入口原则：重要子系统文档不能把规则、状态、层级和方法论塞进一个文件。违反协同升级原则：修复需要同步 route、information-map、loop-registry、Canvas source_of_truth、tool-map、validator、index 和诊断记录。违反机器友好数据流原则：文档边界和 loop 资产也需要机器可读地图。
issues.failed_mindset: taxonomy-doc-as-folder thinking: 把领域分类文档当成普通 Markdown 集合，而不是持续增长的分类子系统表面。
issues.immediate_root_cause: domain taxonomy 有 registry、routing guide、overview、refinement loop、runs、outputs 和 visual view，但没有 domain-taxonomy.docs.json 接管文档边界，也没有 loop README 作为薄入口。
issues.positive_rule: 领域分类子系统必须采用 thin seed + docs map + routed topic docs：seed 只放入口顺序和机器真相，registry 决定分类树，baseline/routing/overview/loop/audit 各自承载边界明确的内容。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 把完整分类表、路由规则、loop 状态、运行历史和文档路由持续堆进 domain-taxonomy-seed.md。
issues.quality_gate: validate-system 必须检查 domain-taxonomy.docs.json、thin seed、doc_routes、managed_human_docs 和 loop_assets；route、information map、Canvas source_of_truth 必须指向 docs map。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair created domain-taxonomy.docs.json, converted domain-taxonomy-seed.md into a thin entrypoint, moved baseline/status/table material into domain-taxonomy-baseline.md, added a taxonomy-refinement loop README, synchronized route/information/loop/canvas/tool registrations, and added validate-system checks for taxonomy docs map, managed docs and loop assets.
issues.positive_model_repair: 领域分类子系统必须采用 thin seed + docs map + routed topic docs：seed 只放入口顺序和机器真相，registry 决定分类树，baseline/routing/overview/loop/audit 各自承载边界明确的内容。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 技术文档与运维发布准备需要独立模块登记
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出知识库还需要技术文档模块，因为后续运维关键，未来项目可能发布到 GitHub。诊断发现这不是单纯新增 Markdown，而是新增一个长期系统表面：本地设置、运维、校验、排障和 GitHub 发布准备会持续增长，如果不登记，容易散落在 README、docs 和聊天记录里。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 现有 README 只有基础仓库说明；docs/ 下已有架构、Canvas、诊断、采集等文档，但没有技术运维文档边界。新增 docs/technical/ 与 system/technical-docs-map.json 后，还必须同步 route-registry、information-map、module-governance-policy、tool-map 和 validate-system，否则系统无法稳定路由和校验这个模块。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先诊断新增需求属于哪一层；技术文档属于系统运维表面，不属于知识内容分类。原则 2 要求系统升级协同，必须同步路由、信息地图、工具、校验和诊断记录。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，技术文档目录必须由 JSON docs map 接管，Markdown 只做人类说明。
issues.failed_mindset: README-only thinking: 把运维、安装、发布、排障和校验说明都塞进 README 或散落 docs，而没有给持续增长的技术文档建立模块边界和机器可读路由。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 技术文档最初被视为普通说明文档，而不是会影响长期维护、外部发布、校验入口和读者上手路径的系统模块。
issues.positive_rule: 技术文档一旦服务于长期运维或未来发布，就必须拥有薄入口、机器可读 docs map、任务路由、信息地图模块、治理表面和校验门。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 只新增 README 或散落 Markdown，却不登记 docs map、route、information map、tool map 和 validate-system 校验。
issues.quality_gate: validate-system 必须检查 system/technical-docs-map.json、docs/technical/ 薄入口、doc_routes 唯一性、机器真相引用和目录内 Markdown 全登记；技术文档变更还应运行诊断、索引和知识库校验链路。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair created a technical documentation subsystem with system/technical-docs-map.json, thin docs/technical/README.md, routed setup/operations/validation/github-readiness/troubleshooting docs, synchronized route/information/module-governance/tool registrations, and added validate-system checks for technical doc routes and directory coverage.
issues.positive_model_repair: 技术文档一旦服务于长期运维或未来发布，就必须拥有薄入口、机器可读 docs map、任务路由、信息地图模块、治理表面和校验门。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 模块增多后需要系统闭环总表避免登记和责任缺口
issues.failure_packet: 用户追问模块那么多是否已经完成闭环。诊断发现系统已有 route、information-map、module-governance、diagnostics、tool-map、docs map 和 validation，但缺少一个跨模块矩阵来统一回答每个模块是否具备入口、机器真相、路由、校验、文档边界、可视化、诊断接入和生命周期。
issues.lower_evidence_track: information-map 已登记多个模块，route-registry 已有任务路由，validate-system 能检查很多具体 registry，但没有强制 information-map 中每个模块都在一个 closure matrix 里逐项声明状态和缺口。因此模块增加时，系统可以局部通过校验，却仍可能缺少跨模块闭环视角。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先诊断问题属于哪一层；这是系统治理层问题。原则 2 要求系统升级协同，闭环总表必须同步 route、information-map、module-governance、tool-map、diagnostics 和 validator。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，闭环状态必须用 JSON 记录，不能只靠聊天结论。
issues.failed_mindset: module-list thinking: 只看模块是否存在和路径是否存在，而不看每个模块是否能被路由、修改、校验、诊断、可视化和生命周期管理接住。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统缺少 system/system-closure-map.json 这样的跨模块闭环矩阵，也缺少 validate-system 对 information-map 模块覆盖率、route 引用和闭环状态的校验。
issues.positive_rule: 每个 information-map 模块都必须进入 system-closure-map，并声明 canonical truth、route、validation、documentation、visual projection、diagnostics、lifecycle 和 known gaps。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 新增模块后只更新 information-map 或 route，却不更新闭环矩阵，导致模块表面上存在、实际上没人知道是否可维护。
issues.quality_gate: validate-system 必须检查 system/system-closure-map.json 覆盖所有 information-map 模块、引用的 route_id 存在、引用路径存在、状态值合法、partial 或 seed 模块有 known_gaps 和 next_action。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair created system/system-closure-map.json, added a thin docs/system-closure.md, registered the system-closure route and information-map module, added module-governance and tool-map coverage, and extended validate-system so future modules cannot be added without closure-map coverage.
issues.positive_model_repair: 每个 information-map 模块都必须进入 system-closure-map，并声明 canonical truth、route、validation、documentation、visual projection、diagnostics、lifecycle 和 known gaps。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 系统闭环模块应触发 Canvas 可视化但初版只停留在 JSON
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出：按理说闭环本身也应该触发可视化模块。诊断发现 system-closure 已进入 information-map 和 system-truth-to-canvas 数据流，但 system/system-closure-map.json 中该模块 visual_projection 仍为 partial，且没有对应 .canvas、canvas-registry 视图或 canvas-view-graph 节点。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 system/system-closure-map.json 发现 system-closure 模块标记为 seed/partial，visual_projection.views 为空；检查 canvas-registry 和 canvas-view-graph 发现没有 system-closure-architecture-map；检查 30-maps/canvas/10-system/ 发现没有 system-closure 画布目录。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 2 要求系统升级协同，闭环模块新增后不应只更新 JSON，还要同步 Canvas 视觉投影、registry、view graph 和导航入口。原则 3 要求信息地图与机器友好数据流，视觉系统也要有机器可读登记，不能只做孤立图。
issues.failed_mindset: registry-only closure thinking: 认为闭环矩阵有 JSON 和 validator 就够了，忽略闭环本身是跨模块治理结构，属于应该被可视化的稳定系统表面。
issues.immediate_root_cause: system-closure-map 创建时虽然记录了 visual_projection partial 和 next_action，但没有立即执行对应 Canvas 资产迁移，也没有把 system/system-closure-map.json 加入 Canvas sync trigger。
issues.positive_rule: 跨模块闭环矩阵、模块成熟度表和系统治理缺口清单属于稳定结构；一旦成为当前治理入口，就必须触发注册 Canvas 视图，并同步 canvas-registry、canvas-view-graph、导航画布和 validate-canvas。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 只把可视化要求写成 known_gaps 或 next_action，却不创建、登记、链接和校验实际 Canvas 视图。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 必须通过，system-closure-architecture-map 必须存在于 canvas-registry、canvas-view-graph、顶层导航和 system-closure-map.visual_projection.views 中。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair created a current system-closure Canvas view, linked it from the top navigation and system architecture view, registered it in canvas-registry and canvas-view-graph, updated system-closure-map visual_projection to closed, and added Canvas sync triggers for system/system-closure-map.json.
issues.positive_model_repair: 跨模块闭环矩阵、模块成熟度表和系统治理缺口清单属于稳定结构；一旦成为当前治理入口，就必须触发注册 Canvas 视图，并同步 canvas-registry、canvas-view-graph、导航画布和 validate-canvas。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Canvas 文件夹未表达读图层级导致不知道从哪张图读起
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出 Canvas 系统目录下目录和图太多，不知道该从哪读起，并要求文件夹最好体现图之间上下层级关系。诊断发现实际图已增长为入口、系统总览、Canvas 子系统、诊断系统、系统闭环和领域 taxonomy，但目录和说明曾把 L1 总览图与 L2 子系统图放成近似平级，无法从文件树判断阅读顺序。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 迁移前 30-maps/canvas/10-system/ 下的 kb-system、canvas-system、diagnostic-system、system-closure 都作为平级目录存在；README、file-placement、obsidian-workflow 和 canvas-directory-layout.canvas 仍使用 system/domain 这类大桶或旧路径表达，canvas-registry 的通用子系统默认目录也指向 30-maps/canvas/10-system/。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先诊断层级，问题属于 Canvas 系统目录治理和视觉导航层，不是单张图内容问题。原则 2 要求协同升级，移动图文件必须同步 registry、view graph、route、docs、diagnostics 和 validation。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，目录层级规则必须进入 canvas-system 和 canvas-registry，而不只写在人类说明里。
issues.failed_mindset: flat-gallery thinking: 把 Canvas 当成若干图文件的集合，而不是按入口、总览、下钻、生命周期组织的可导航视图网络。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 目录命名只表达大类和模块名，没有把读图顺序与视图层级编码进路径，导致 L0、L1、L2 图在文件树中缺少清晰上下级关系。
issues.positive_rule: 稳定 Canvas 目录必须先表达阅读层级和缩放层级，再表达模块身份：00-entry 是入口，10-system/00-overview 是系统总览，10-system/10-subsystems/{module} 是系统子模块下钻，20-knowledge/10-domain-taxonomy 是知识分类入口。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 把系统总览图和子系统内部图都作为 10-system 下的平级模块目录，或只移动文件而不更新 registry、view graph、文档、图内 file node 和诊断记录。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 必须通过；旧 Canvas 路径不得残留；canvas-registry.storage_layout 和 view_type_rules 必须把 system overview 与 system subsystem drilldown 分开。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair migrated Canvas files into a reading-order hierarchy, updated all path references, separated system overview from subsystem drilldown in canvas-system and canvas-registry, redrew the Canvas directory layout map, synchronized human docs, and verified the result with Canvas, system, diagnostics, index and KB validation.
issues.positive_model_repair: 稳定 Canvas 目录必须先表达阅读层级和缩放层级，再表达模块身份：00-entry 是入口，10-system/00-overview 是系统总览，10-system/10-subsystems/{module} 是系统子模块下钻，20-knowledge/10-domain-taxonomy 是知识分类入口。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Entry 导航图混入机器真相和占位目标导致不符合 L0 绘制规则
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出 entry 这张图不符合绘制规则，并要求审查其他图是否也一样。诊断发现 kb-navigation-index 虽登记为 L0 navigation，但画布上仍包含 registry/view-graph/data-separation 等机器真相文件节点、future workflow/project/draft placeholder，以及从中心 entry 发散到占位目标的边；这些内容不属于纯跳转索引。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 30-maps/canvas/00-entry/kb-navigation-index.canvas 发现 8 个 file nodes，其中 3 个不是 .canvas 视图文件；存在 workflow/project/draft placeholder 文本节点和指向这些 placeholder 的边。横向审查其他 current 图发现 canvas-system、diagnostic-system、system-closure 中存在可见 .canvas 文件节点未全部进入 navigation_nodes 的机器登记缺口。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先从局部现象追溯到层级，本问题属于 Canvas 视图边界和校验层，不是单张图局部美化。原则 2 要求协同升级，因此需要同时修改 entry 画布、相关结构图、canvas-registry、canvas-view-graph、canvas-system、文档和 validator。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，图上可点击的 Canvas 跳转必须进入 navigation_nodes 和 view graph，不能只靠 Obsidian 画布坐标存在。
issues.failed_mindset: exception-too-wide thinking: 因为 navigation-index 被排除在右侧导航栏校验之外，就把它误当成几乎不需要绘制约束的例外；同时把画布可见链接当成人读便利，没有强制同步到机器图网络。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 系统只有非导航结构图的右侧导航栏质量门，缺少 L0 入口图的纯导航质量门，也缺少“可见 .canvas 文件节点必须登记为 navigation_nodes”的通用校验。
issues.positive_rule: L0 entry 图只能作为纯跳转索引：文件节点只指向已登记 .canvas 视图，所有 Canvas 文件节点必须登记到 navigation_nodes；任何 current/active 图上可见的注册 Canvas 跳转都必须同步到机器导航登记。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 在 L0 entry 图上放 JSON、Markdown、脚本、机器真相文件、future placeholder 或非导航边；在结构图右侧栏放 .canvas 链接但不登记到 navigation_nodes 和 canvas-view-graph。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 必须拒绝 L0 navigation view 的非 .canvas 文件节点、未登记 Canvas 文件节点、非导航边；同时拒绝任何 current/active 图里指向已登记 Canvas view 但未列入 navigation_nodes 的 file node。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair converted kb-navigation-index into a pure L0 jump list, removed machine truth and placeholder navigation from entry, registered visible Canvas links in affected structural views, synchronized canvas-view-graph, added L0 and visible-Canvas-node validation gates, and documented the boundary rule.
issues.positive_model_repair: L0 entry 图只能作为纯跳转索引：文件节点只指向已登记 .canvas 视图，所有 Canvas 文件节点必须登记到 navigation_nodes；任何 current/active 图上可见的注册 Canvas 跳转都必须同步到机器导航登记。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Canvas 导航栏只显示文件名缩略导致用户不知道导航目的
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出右侧导航栏里只有 Obsidian 文件节点缩略和被截断的 .canvas 文件名，无法判断每个导航入口会跳到哪里。症状发生在 current Canvas 的导航栏可读性层：导航关系存在，但人类目的标签缺失。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 审查 current/active Canvas 发现导航文件节点虽然已登记到 navigation_nodes，但视觉上主要依赖 Obsidian 默认文件名和缩略预览；文件名如 kb-navigation-index.canvas、domain-taxonomy-overview.canvas、system-closure-architecture.canvas 在缩放后被截断，边线标签 nav/related 也不能说明目的。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从局部视觉现象追溯到绘制规范层；原则 2 要求协同升级，因此不能只改一张图，必须同步所有 current/active 图、Canvas 规则、文档和 validator；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流和人机分层，机器用 navigation_nodes，用户则需要明确中文目的标签。
issues.failed_mindset: filename-as-label thinking: 把 Obsidian 文件节点的默认文件名显示误当成足够的人类导航标签，忽略缩放、截断和预览噪音。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 质量门只检查导航节点是否存在和是否登记，没有要求每个导航文件节点必须配套可读的中文目的标签。
issues.positive_rule: 每个 current/active Canvas 中登记的导航文件节点都必须配一个 nav-label-{node_id} 文本节点，直接写明中文目的，例如“返回：总导航入口”“相关：系统闭环总表”。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 让用户靠被截断的文件名、缩略预览或 nav/related 边线标签猜导航目的。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 必须检查每个 navigation_nodes 条目都有对应的 nav-label-{node_id} 文本节点，并且 label text 非空；右侧导航布局校验应把 nav-label-* 视为导航栏的一部分。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair added visible Chinese destination labels to navigation nodes across current/active Canvas views, removed ambiguous nav/related edge labels from navigation edges, upgraded Canvas rules and validation so labels are mandatory, and verified all Canvas files with validate-canvas.
issues.positive_model_repair: 每个 current/active Canvas 中登记的导航文件节点都必须配一个 nav-label-{node_id} 文本节点，直接写明中文目的，例如“返回：总导航入口”“相关：系统闭环总表”。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 导航栏需要与当前图内容建立可区分的上下文对应线
issues.failure_packet: 用户提出导航栏和当前内容内部关系是否可以用特别线条连接。现有图已经有右侧导航栏和中文目的标签，但导航入口仍像外部菜单，用户无法直观看出某个导航项对应当前图里的哪个模块、状态区或治理节点。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 current/active Canvas 后确认，导航文件节点已登记且有 nav-label，但导航边主要在右侧栏内部纵向连接；没有一类受控线型把导航项连接到主内容节点。若直接使用普通边连接，容易和主流程/dataflow/workflow 边混淆。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先诊断问题层级，本问题属于 Canvas 视觉语义层；原则 2 要求系统升级协同，需要更新现有图、规则、文档和 validator；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，新增线型必须可被脚本识别为视觉对应关系，而不是从坐标或边标签随意推断。
issues.failed_mindset: menu-only navigation thinking: 把导航栏当成外部菜单，忽略它和当前图主内容之间需要显式上下文对应。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 系统缺少一种正式的 context bridge 线型，无法既表达导航项与主内容的对应关系，又避免与数据流、workflow、依赖或 source-of-truth 边混淆。
issues.positive_rule: 非导航结构图可以使用 bridge-* 上下文连接线，把导航标签或导航文件节点连接到对应的主内容节点；线标签必须以“对应：”开头，并且只表达视觉对应，不表达数据流或执行顺序。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 用普通主流程线连接导航栏和主内容，或用上下文连接线表达数据流、workflow、依赖关系、registry truth 或 source binding。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 必须检查 bridge-* 边：不能出现在 L0 navigation-index；必须连接恰好一个导航端点和一个主内容端点；必须带包含“对应”的标签；引用节点必须存在。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair introduced bridge-* context edges with “对应：...” labels, connected navigation items to corresponding main-content nodes across structural Canvas views, documented the new visual semantics, and extended validate-canvas to distinguish bridge edges from dataflow or workflow edges.
issues.positive_model_repair: 非导航结构图可以使用 bridge-* 上下文连接线，把导航标签或导航文件节点连接到对应的主内容节点；线标签必须以“对应：”开头，并且只表达视觉对应，不表达数据流或执行顺序。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: 上下文连接线直连主内容导致被卡片和状态带遮挡
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出新增的上下文连接线被主卡片、状态带和机器真相区域遮挡。问题发生在系统总览等结构图中：bridge-* 线语义正确，但几何路径从右侧导航栏斜穿主内容区，降低可读性。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 current Canvas 发现 bridge-* 边从 nav-label-* 直接连接到 stage-domain、stage-index、status-band、canvas-policy、owner-layer 等主内容节点；当目标节点离右侧导航栏较远时，连线穿过多张卡片或大型 band，Obsidian 又会让节点覆盖线条，导致线段断裂或标签压在卡片上。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求先诊断层级，问题属于 Canvas 视觉路由层而非单条线。原则 2 要求协同升级，需同步现有桥接线、Canvas 规则、文档和 validator。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，bridge 线型必须继续可被脚本识别，同时避免依赖人工记忆绕线。
issues.failed_mindset: direct-line correspondence thinking: 认为导航项和主内容有关系就应该直接连到主卡片，忽略 Canvas 线条会被节点遮挡以及主流程线语义会被干扰。
issues.immediate_root_cause: context bridge 协议只定义了语义，没有定义长距离连接的避让路径和 bridge-anchor-* 锚点机制。
issues.positive_rule: 长距离上下文对应关系优先连接到右侧空白通道里的 bridge-anchor-* 锚点标签；锚点写明对应主内容模块，bridge-* 线保持短距离，不穿过主卡片、状态带或机器真相带。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 从右侧导航标签直接拉长斜线穿过主内容区，或让 bridge-* 线覆盖主流程、状态卡、机器真相文件带。
issues.quality_gate: validate-canvas 继续检查 bridge-* 边的语义边界；视觉规则要求长距离 bridge 使用 bridge-anchor-* gutter label，人工审查发现遮挡时必须迁移为锚点线。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair rerouted long context bridge edges through bridge-anchor-* gutter labels, updated Canvas rules and docs to prefer anchor-based routing for obstructed lines, and verified bridge semantics with validate-canvas.
issues.positive_model_repair: 长距离上下文对应关系优先连接到右侧空白通道里的 bridge-anchor-* 锚点标签；锚点写明对应主内容模块，bridge-* 线保持短距离，不穿过主卡片、状态带或机器真相带。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Canvas 只有结构校验缺少视觉审美检查
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出系统总览图虽然通过了 Canvas 结构校验，但视觉上仍有明显审美和可读性问题：标题/说明横条过宽、主流程线和反馈线杂乱、锚点贴近主内容、空白卡片残留。用户追问是否没有视觉审美检查。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 scripts/validate-canvas.ps1 发现它主要验证 JSON、registry、view graph、navigation_nodes、右侧导航栏位置、L0 入口纯导航和 bridge 语义；没有检查空白 text node、节点重叠、长线、锚点拥挤或视觉扫描性。运行新增视觉审计初版后抓到系统总览图的空白节点、锚点过近和超长反馈线。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从视觉现象追溯到校验层，问题不是单张图调坐标，而是缺少 visual audit gate。原则 2 要求协同升级，因此需要新增脚本、登记 tool-map、更新 route validate、Canvas 规则、文档和当前图资产。原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，审美检查要以可执行脚本输出，而不是只靠聊天里的肉眼评价。
issues.failed_mindset: semantic-pass-is-visual-pass thinking: 认为 registry 和 navigation 关系正确就等于图已经可读，忽略 Canvas 是人读视觉界面，必须有独立的视觉可读性检查。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 系统缺少 scripts/audit-canvas-visual.ps1 这样的视觉审美审计工具，也没有把审美审计纳入 tool-map、route validate 和 Canvas quality gates。
issues.positive_rule: Canvas 修改后必须区分结构正确和视觉可读：validate-canvas 检查机器关系，audit-canvas-visual 检查空白节点、重叠、锚点拥挤和超长线；current/active 视图只有两者都通过才算视觉接受。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 只因为 validate-canvas 通过就接受一张图，或者把明显的遮挡、空白卡片、长斜线、拥挤锚点留给用户肉眼发现。
issues.quality_gate: scripts/audit-canvas-visual.ps1 必须在 Canvas 视觉修改后运行；Canvas route validate 必须包含该脚本；tool-map 必须登记 audit-canvas-visual。
issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The repair added a dedicated Canvas visual aesthetic audit script, registered it in tool-map and route validation, updated Canvas quality rules and docs, fixed the current overview/closure visual issues it detected, and verified all current/active Canvas views with 0 visual-audit warnings.
issues.positive_model_repair: Canvas 修改后必须区分结构正确和视觉可读：validate-canvas 检查机器关系，audit-canvas-visual 检查空白节点、重叠、锚点拥挤和超长线；current/active 视图只有两者都通过才算视觉接受。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Canvas 视觉审查缺少线路摆放与遮挡检查
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出视觉审查不能只看空卡、重叠和长线，还必须把线路摆放做好。现有审查能发现部分长桥接线，但没有把普通边是否穿过卡片、横幅、导航标签或文件节点作为硬门禁。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 运行几何扫描发现多个 current/active Canvas 中，导航串联线穿过 nav-label-*，机器真相引用线穿过横向分区带，分类和模块图中部分长斜线穿过相邻卡片。validate-canvas 仍可通过，因为它只检查结构语义，不检查线段几何遮挡。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从局部截图现象追溯到更高层的绘图质量门；原则 2 要求不能只改一张图，必须同步 Canvas 规则、脚本、登记、文档、诊断队列和现有资产；原则 3 要求把可重复判断变成机器友好的数据流，而不是依赖人工肉眼记忆。
issues.failed_mindset: semantic-line thinking: 只要边的语义正确就接受，忽略 Canvas 是人读视觉界面，线条本身也会占用空间、遮挡文字并改变阅读路径。
issues.immediate_root_cause: audit-canvas-visual.ps1 的初版缺少边到非端点节点的几何相交检测，也缺少对低价值长斜线、导航串联线和文件引用线的通用处理原则。
issues.positive_rule: Canvas 线条是一级布局对象。current/active 视图里的线不能穿过非端点卡片、标签、文件节点或分区带；低价值引用线优先移除，用分区、标签、就近说明或 bridge-anchor-* 替代。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 让导航竖线穿过导航标签；让机器真相文件节点长线穿过横向分区带；为了表达分组从标题向每张卡拉扇形长线；把通过语义校验当成通过视觉审查。
issues.quality_gate: scripts/audit-canvas-visual.ps1 -Strict 必须通过：空卡、重叠、桥接线长度、长斜线警告、边穿过非端点节点都不能残留。

validation.note: Run audit-canvas-visual with -Strict for visual acceptance.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted after strict visual audit reports 0 warnings and current/active Canvas assets no longer contain line-node obstruction patterns.
issues.positive_model_repair: Canvas 线条是一级布局对象。current/active 视图里的线不能穿过非端点卡片、标签、文件节点或分区带；低价值引用线优先移除，用分区、标签、就近说明或 bridge-anchor-* 替代。
issues.constraint_decision: Guardrail used for this captured issue because the recurrence risk was treated as high; legacy forbidden_pattern and quality_gate record the chosen constraint.

issues.title: Canvas 右侧导航需要用清晰线路连接到当前层面真实内容
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出右侧导航栏不应只用短桥接线停在右侧锚点，而应该用好的连线直接和当前层面的内容连起来。截图显示系统架构图中导航项只连到右侧小锚点，用户仍然需要猜它对应主图中的哪个内容节点。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 kb-system-architecture.canvas 发现 bridge-* 线只连接 nav-label-* 到 bridge-anchor-*，没有继续连接到 stage-domain、stage-index、status-band、machine-truth-band、feedback-note 等当前内容节点。此前为避免遮挡而删掉长线，但修复过度，丢失了导航到主内容的直观投影。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从截图现象追溯到 Canvas 视觉语义层；原则 2 要求同步图资产、Canvas 规则、审查脚本、文档和诊断记录；原则 3 要求把这种视觉关系变成机器可识别的 context-route 数据流，而不是靠人工记忆。
issues.failed_mindset: anchor-only thinking: 为了避免线穿卡，把导航关系停在右侧锚点，忽略用户真正需要看到导航项对应当前图里的哪个实际内容节点。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas context bridge 协议只有语义边界和短锚点机制，没有定义当直连会遮挡时如何用可审查的折线路由继续连接到真实内容节点。
issues.positive_rule: 右侧导航到当前内容的关系应优先连接到真实内容节点；如果直线会穿卡，使用 bridge-* + context-route-* 组成清晰折线，经过 context-rail/context-corridor/context-port 节点后终止于当前内容卡片或分区。
issues.forbidden_pattern: 导航对应线永远停在右侧锚点；或者为了直连从右侧导航拉一条长斜线穿过主卡片。
issues.quality_gate: audit-canvas-visual.ps1 -Strict 必须通过；context-route-* 可以经过连接节点，但不得穿过真实内容卡片、导航标签、文件节点或分区带。

validation.note: Run audit-canvas-visual with -Strict for visual acceptance.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted after kb-system-architecture uses routed context lines from right navigation to current-layer content nodes and strict visual audit reports 0 warnings.
issues.positive_model_repair: 右侧导航到当前内容的关系应优先连接到真实内容节点；如果直线会穿卡，使用 bridge-* + context-route-* 组成清晰折线，经过 context-rail/context-corridor/context-port 节点后终止于当前内容卡片或分区。

issues.title: Canvas 上下文路由点显示成机械布线卡片
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出右侧导航到主内容的 context-route 路由点显示成彩色小卡片后，画面像布线图，缺少人的导览感。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 kb-system-architecture.canvas 发现 context-rail/context-corridor/context-port 曾使用 type=text、44x34、text=. 的可见节点；audit-canvas-visual 当时没有禁止这种可见路由点。

issues.title: Canvas 导航到内容的长线路由过度，画面呈现布线感
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出系统架构图中右侧导航与左侧内容的连线关系仍然不够美观。虽然上一轮已经把 route 点隐藏为 group 节点，但长距离 context-route 线和右侧竖向路线仍然让画面像工程布线，干扰主系统数据流。

issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从截图现象追溯到 Canvas 视觉语法层，而不是继续微调坐标。原则 2 要求同步修改 canvas 资产、规则、审查脚本、文档、tool map 和诊断队列。原则 3 要求把新的视觉偏好变成机器可检查的数据流，而不是只靠人工记忆。
issues.failed_mindset: wire-routing thinking: 认为只要线不遮挡、节点不可见，导航关系就应该继续用长线表达，忽略了 Canvas 作为人读架构图需要优先保持主结构的安静和可扫视。
issues.immediate_root_cause: context bridge 协议把“导航要对应到真实内容”过度实现为长距离路由线，缺少“配对标记 + 局部短线”的默认视觉语法，也缺少 audit 对 context-route 过度使用的提醒。

issues.forbidden_pattern: 为了表达“相关”而从右侧导航拉长线、竖线或折线路由到主图内容，导致路线脊柱与主数据流竞争。

issues.title: Canvas main content and right navigation gutter is too tight
issues.failure_packet: User pointed out that the main body and right-side navigation are still too close together. The symptom appears in current Canvas structural views: navigation labels and interpretation lines sit too near the main cards, so navigation context competes visually with the primary structure.
issues.lower_evidence_track: Measured current and active non-navigation Canvas views by comparing main content right edge with registered navigation label left edge. Before migration, gaps included 60px for domain-taxonomy-overview-map, 140px for canvas-directory-layout-map, 160px for canvas-system-architecture-map, 180px for knowledge-base-system-architecture-map, and 200px for diagnostic/system-closure views.
issues.upper_principle_track: Principle 1 requires tracing the visual symptom to the Canvas layout protocol. Principle 2 requires updating current governed assets, machine policy, documentation, audit gates and diagnostics together. Principle 3 requires encoding the layout expectation in machine-friendly validation instead of leaving it as chat-only taste.
issues.failed_mindset: edge-only thinking: after fixing line semantics, the remaining visual spacing was treated as a local coordinate detail instead of a reusable layout boundary between body and navigation.
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas layout policy separated main structure and right navigation conceptually but did not define a minimum whitespace gutter or audit check for cramped navigation placement.
issues.positive_rule: Current or active non-navigation structural Canvas views should keep a clear main-to-navigation gutter: target about 220px between the main content right edge and right-side navigation labels, and never fall below 200px.
issues.forbidden_pattern: Right-side navigation labels or bridge lines placed close enough to the main content that they visually merge with primary structure, workflow, taxonomy, state or machine-truth zones.
issues.quality_gate: scripts/audit-canvas-visual.ps1 -Strict warns or fails when the measured main-to-navigation gutter is below 200px.

validation.note: Current structural views were migrated to about a 220px main-to-navigation gutter; final validation is rerun after this issue record.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when the affected current structural Canvas views keep at least a 200px gutter, the policy and docs describe the rule, and audit-canvas-visual.ps1 checks the gutter in strict mode.
issues.positive_model_repair: Current or active non-navigation structural Canvas views should keep a clear main-to-navigation gutter: target about 220px between the main content right edge and right-side navigation labels, and never fall below 200px.

Principle 2 required updating asset, registry, validation, docs, tool map and diagnostics. Principle 3 required a machine-checkable archive retirement rule because visible legacy files are still part of the human navigation surface.

issues.title: Visual coverage blind spots lacked a global machine-checkable gate
issues.failure_packet: User pointed out that the prior diagnosis fixed the missing level-3 taxonomy view but did not prove future important system diagrams would not be missed. This exposed a reusable visual blind-spot failure mode.
issues.lower_evidence_track: Evidence showed system-closure-map had per-module visual_projection notes and canvas-registry had registered views, but no global map connected closure modules to required/shared/deferred visual coverage decisions. validate-system only checked the domain-taxonomy docs visual_coverage contract, so other modules could silently lack required visualization.
issues.upper_principle_track: Principle 1 required tracing the symptom from one missing view to the missing owner layer. Principle 2 required coordinated upgrade across route, information map, closure, Canvas system, validation, tool map, diagnostics and existing assets. Principle 3 required machine-friendly data flow, so the decision must live in JSON and be validated rather than remembered from chat.
issues.failed_mindset: case-by-case visual repair thinking: treating each missing Canvas view as a local omission instead of adding a system gate that decides visual coverage for every module.
issues.immediate_root_cause: The Canvas subsystem had a visual_coverage_policy in prose-like registry fields, but no machine-readable visual coverage map and no validate-system rule requiring every closure module to have an explicit visual coverage decision.
issues.positive_rule: Every module in system/system-closure-map.json must have exactly one visual coverage decision: dedicated_required, shared_required, deferred or not_applicable. Required/shared views must be registered in canvas-registry and covered by system/visual-coverage-map.json.
issues.forbidden_pattern: Closing a module or a system upgrade while important visualization is only implied by chat, Markdown, closure notes or an existing high-level overview.
issues.quality_gate: scripts/validate-system.ps1 must fail when a closure module lacks a visual coverage decision, when a required view is not registered, or when closed/shared visual_projection paths are not covered by visual-coverage-map required_views.

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after this system upgrade.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when visual-coverage-map exists, all closure modules have explicit decisions, required/shared views are checked against canvas-registry, existing Canvas subsystem and closure views expose the new gate, and validation passes.
issues.positive_model_repair: Every module in system/system-closure-map.json must have exactly one visual coverage decision: dedicated_required, shared_required, deferred or not_applicable. Required/shared views must be registered in canvas-registry and covered by system/visual-coverage-map.json.

issues.title: 诊断原则已升级但执行契约仍停留在旧负面约束模型
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出当前效果需要审查。表面现象是 Canvas 与诊断闭环已经多次修复，但更高层问题是：系统已经接受“先修正向模型，再决定是否加负面约束”的原则，可诊断系统的执行契约仍要求每条诊断都写 positive_rule、forbidden_pattern、quality_gate，导致新原则没有真正进入 schema、校验脚本、skill 输出和 issue 队列。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 沿机器执行路径检查：system/diagnostics/diagnostic-system.json 的 issue_record_contract.required_fields 仍包含 positive_rule、forbidden_pattern、quality_gate；schemas/diagnostic-issue.schema.json 仍把这些字段列为 required；scripts/validate-diagnostics.ps1 也硬编码检查这些旧 required 字段；.agents/skills/diagnostic-system/SKILL.md 的输出模板仍要求 Positive rule / Forbidden pattern / Quality gate；issue-repair-queue.execution_policy.required_structured_fields 同样沿用旧字段。
issues.upper_principle_track: 这违反三条高层原则。原则 1：遇到问题先诊断，但旧契约会把诊断结果预设为“补禁令”，而不是追溯产生洞的机制。原则 2：系统升级必须协同，但此前只升级了 repair_design_policy 这类原则层，没有同步迁移 schema、validator、skill、queue 和治理策略。原则 3：信息地图与机器友好数据流要求机器契约才是真相，Markdown 或聊天中的新原则不能覆盖旧 required 字段。
issues.failed_mindset: principle-only upgrade thinking：把高层原则写进系统说明后，以为系统行为已经改变，却没有检查真正约束未来 agent 行为的字段契约、schema required、校验脚本和队列执行政策。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 诊断模块缺少“原则变更 -> 执行契约迁移”的闭环。新原则只进入了 repair_design_policy，旧的记录结构仍把 negative constraint 当成固定输出，因此未来诊断会继续被旧契约拉回“每次都补 forbidden_pattern / quality_gate”的模式。
issues.positive_model_repair: 把诊断记录的正向主模型改为 positive_model_repair + constraint_decision：每个非平凡诊断必须先说明应该修复哪个正向系统模型，再说明是否需要约束；positive_rule、forbidden_pattern、quality_gate 只作为历史字段或明确需要护栏时的补充字段。同步迁移 diagnostic-system.json、diagnostic-issue.schema.json、validate-diagnostics.ps1、diagnostic-system skill、issue-repair-queue 和模块治理校验策略。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要保留诊断校验，但校验保护的对象从“每条记录必须有 forbidden_pattern / quality_gate”改成“每条记录必须有 positive_model_repair / constraint_decision”。也就是说，不取消质量门，而是把质量门从负面约束模型迁移到正向诊断模型。

validation.note: 本轮修正后重新运行完整校验链。

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. 主问题已经作为诊断契约漂移处理：诊断系统的 required 字段、schema、validator、skill 输出、历史队列和模块治理校验策略已经迁移到 positive_model_repair + constraint_decision；旧字段保留为历史/护栏补充字段。本次继续补齐可视化投影：diagnostic-system-architecture.canvas 也已同步表达新契约和 visual_projection_review 闭环。

issues.title: Diagnosis was captured but not clearly surfaced in the final response
issues.failure_packet: After the diagnostic contract drift was repaired and recorded in the issue queue, the user pointed out that the issue itself should be diagnosed. The final response had mentioned that a diagnosis was registered, but did not show the captured issue_id or a structured diagnosis summary, making the diagnosis feel invisible.
issues.lower_evidence_track: The issue queue already contained diag-20260607-diagnostic-contract-negative-constraint-drift with required diagnosis fields and passing validation. The diagnostic-system skill output required diagnosis fields, but the workflow had no explicit final step for surfacing a concise user-facing diagnosis summary after capture.
issues.upper_principle_track: Diagnose-before-fixing requires the diagnosis to be visible enough for the user to verify. Coordinated upgrade requires aligning diagnostic-system.json, skill entry and human docs. Machine-friendly flow still keeps JSON as truth, but human closure must point to the machine record instead of hiding it.
issues.failed_mindset: internal-closure thinking: treating a machine-captured issue as closed once validators pass, without ensuring the user can see which diagnosis was captured and why it closes the reported symptom.
issues.immediate_root_cause: The diagnostic workflow had diagnosis_acceptance but lacked a user-facing diagnosis-summary step, so final responses could collapse diagnosis into a change summary.
issues.positive_model_repair: Add a surface-diagnosis-summary step to the diagnostic workflow: when a non-trivial issue is captured, final responses should name the issue_id or queue status and summarize symptom, owning repair layer, positive_model_repair, constraint_decision and validation.
issues.constraint_decision: No separate hard validator is added for final prose style yet. The positive workflow step is enough at this stage; validation remains focused on the machine queue and diagnostic contract.

validation.note: validate-system passed before closing the record; validate-diagnostics is rerun after this validation result is written.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Archived as secondary/mis-scoped. It remains historically valid as a communication note, but the user-intended issue is handled by diag-20260607-diagnostic-contract-negative-constraint-drift.
issues.archive_reason: 误把用户所指问题理解为“最终回复未露出诊断摘要”。该问题可作为次级沟通改进保留历史，但不作为本轮主诊断。主诊断是 diag-20260607-diagnostic-contract-negative-constraint-drift。

issues.title: 诊断契约升级后未同步更新诊断模块可视化投影
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出系统没有闭环：诊断契约升级已经更新了规则、schema、validator、skill 和 issue 队列，但对应 Canvas 可视化没有更新。具体表现为 diagnostic-system-architecture.canvas 仍表达旧流程和旧字段，没有展示 positive_model_repair、constraint_decision 和可视化投影同步步骤。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 route-registry diagnostics 路由可见 update_when_changed 包含 30-maps/canvas/10-system/10-subsystems/diagnostic-system/；visual-coverage-map 对 diagnostics 的 review_trigger 明确写着 issue schema / quality gate 改变时要更新 diagnostic view；但诊断画布仍显示旧的“正向规则、禁止模式、质量门”验收口径，未包含新契约字段。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从现象追到更高层原因：这不是单张图过期，而是 system-truth-to-canvas 数据流没有被执行。原则 2 要求系统升级必须协同：规则、schema、validator 和 visual projection 都是受影响面。原则 3 要求信息地图与机器友好数据流：Canvas 虽不是真相，但它是文件系统的可视化影子，重要系统契约变化必须投影到对应图。
issues.failed_mindset: machine-only closure thinking：认为机器契约和校验通过后系统就闭环了，忽略了 architecture-views 模块承担的人类可视化理解面。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 诊断 workflow 只有 affected_surfaces 和 migrate-governed-assets，但没有显式的 visual_projection_review 步骤，导致系统升级时即使模块有 dedicated_required Canvas，也可能只更新机器文件而漏掉图。
issues.positive_model_repair: 把 visual_projection_review 纳入 system_upgrade 的诊断闭环：如果责任模块有 dedicated_required 或 shared_required Canvas 覆盖，必须更新对应 Canvas 或记录为什么无需更新。本次已重绘 diagnostic-system-architecture.canvas，使它表达 positive_model_repair、constraint_decision、可选护栏字段和可视化投影同步步骤。
issues.constraint_decision: 暂不新增内容级硬校验，因为 Canvas 文本是否语义最新很难稳定自动判断；先用诊断 workflow 的 visual_projection_review 和 visual-coverage-map 的 review_trigger 建立正向闭环，并用 validate-canvas 与 audit-canvas-visual 保证结构和视觉质量。

validation.note: validate-system, validate-canvas and audit-canvas-visual -Strict passed after updating the diagnostic Canvas. validate-diagnostics is rerun after this result is written.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The diagnostic contract upgrade now closes through visual projection: diagnostic-system-architecture.canvas visibly shows positive_model_repair, constraint_decision, optional guardrail fields and visual_projection_sync; diagnostic-system.json includes sync-visual-projection; canvas registry, visual coverage and closure map record the visual update; system, canvas and strict visual audit validations passed.

issues.title: Canvas 与系统机器文件存在问号占位文本但校验未发现
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出 canvas-system-architecture.canvas 中出现连续问号占位符一类不可读文本。文件检查确认这些不是 Obsidian 渲染问题，而是 .canvas JSON text 字段里已经写入了 literal question marks。进一步扫描发现 development-principles.json、canvas-registry.json、canvas-system、system-closure、domain-taxonomy 多个 Canvas 文件都存在同类文本污染。validate-canvas 与 strict visual audit 仍通过。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 截图 -> 检查 canvas-system-architecture.canvas -> text 字段含连续问号占位符 -> 全局扫描发现多个系统/Canvas 文件存在 literal question marks -> replacement char 扫描未发现 Unicode 替换字符，说明不是 Obsidian 字体或终端显示问题，而是内容已经被不可逆替换为问号 -> validate-canvas 与 audit-canvas-visual -Strict 都通过，说明现有校验只看 JSON、登记、几何、导航和线条，不看文本可读性。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1：遇到问题先诊断，不能把它当单张图视觉瑕疵；要追到生成/写入链路和校验缺口。原则 2：系统升级必须协同，因为受影响面包括 Canvas 文件、系统 JSON、Canvas 校验、视觉审查、route/information map、诊断记录。原则 3：机器友好数据流要求可视化影子和机器真相都不能含不可读占位符；Markdown/Canvas 不是系统行为真相，但它们承担人类理解入口，文本完整性也必须受控。
issues.failed_mindset: geometry-only visual acceptance：把 Canvas 质量等同于节点不重叠、线条不遮挡、导航位置正确，而没有把文本可读性/占位符污染纳入画布与系统文件的质量门。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 早期 Canvas 或系统 JSON 生成/迁移时，部分中文文本经过不安全的编码/拷贝链路或从乱码输出中回写，已经被替换成 literal “?”；之后的 validate-canvas、audit-canvas-visual 和 validate-system 没有检测“连续问号占位符 / 文本不可读”这一内容完整性问题，所以污染被校验放行并留在当前图里。
issues.positive_model_repair: 已增加 text_integrity_review：Canvas 侧由 validate-canvas 检查 node text 和 edge label；系统侧由 validate-system 检查 system、schemas、domain JSON 字符串。已修复现有 Canvas 与系统 JSON 中的问号占位符污染，并更新 Canvas 系统规则、工具地图、UTF-8 写入策略、排障文档和诊断记录。
issues.constraint_decision: 已加入硬校验。连续问号占位符、Unicode replacement character 和典型 CJK 编码乱码标记是稳定可检测的不变量，会破坏可视化影子和人类理解入口，必须让 validate-canvas/validate-system 失败。

validation.note: Existing polluted Canvas/system text was repaired; validate-canvas and validate-system now include text-integrity gates; text-corruption scan was clean; audit-canvas-visual passed in Strict mode; all route-level and closure validations passed.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The issue was not a single Canvas rendering defect but a missing text-integrity gate plus an unsafe text-write path risk. Current polluted text was repaired, Canvas and system JSON now fail on stable unreadable-text markers, UTF-8 safe-write guidance and Canvas policies were updated, and full system/Canvas/diagnostics/review/index/KB validation passed.

issues.title: Canvas 内部连线和边标签被节点遮挡但视觉审美审查未专门接管
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出部分 Canvas 图中两个单元之间的连线和文字被卡片遮挡，尤其是系统闭环图的主流程边标签。现有 audit-canvas-visual 已能检查节点重叠、线穿过非端点节点、长线和导航区问题，但没有把边标签净空作为一等视觉对象，也没有把 Canvas 视觉审美审查作为 review-system 下的专门子能力登记。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 截图 -> 定位到 system-closure-architecture.canvas 主流程节点间距只有约 80px -> 边标签如 inspect modules、must cover、status + gaps 无法在两个卡片之间完整显示 -> 扫描 current/active Canvas 发现 diagnostic-system、review-system、system-closure 等图存在类似横向边标签净空不足 -> audit-canvas-visual -Strict 仍通过，说明旧视觉审查只覆盖线段交叉和节点重叠，没有覆盖边标签可读性。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1：先诊断问题层级，不能只把单张图拉开；这是 Canvas 视觉审查模型缺项。原则 2：系统升级必须协同，需要同步 Canvas 资产、视觉审查脚本、review-system 登记、docs map、工具地图、诊断记录和校验。原则 3：Canvas 是文件系统的可视化影子，图上的线和标签也属于人类理解入口，必须可读、可审查、可复发检测。
issues.failed_mindset: line-only geometry audit：把视觉线条质量等同于线段不穿过节点，却忽略边标签本身需要独立净空；同时把视觉审查当 Canvas 子系统规则，没有在根 review-system 中形成可复用的视觉审美审查子能力。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 审查系统已有泛化 visual_review 类别，但缺少 Canvas visual aesthetic review 的专门登记、准则和人读入口；audit-canvas-visual 缺少 edge label clearance 检查，导致节点间距不足但未发生几何交叉时仍能通过。
issues.positive_model_repair: 把 Canvas 视觉审美审查登记为 review-system 下的专门子能力；将边标签净空、线条可读性、节点间距、导航关系和视觉投影作为 visual_review 的专门 criteria；让 audit-canvas-visual 检查横向边标签净空；迁移当前受影响 Canvas 图的节点间距。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。边标签被遮挡是稳定可检测的视觉不变量，且会在后续新增模块图时复发；audit-canvas-visual -Strict 应在 current/active 图存在边标签净空不足时失败。

validation.note: Strict Canvas visual audit now checks edge-label clearance and passes with 0 warnings after affected current subsystem views were migrated.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Superseded by follow-up. The repair correctly registered Canvas visual aesthetic review and added an edge-label-clearance gate, but user evidence showed Obsidian still hides edge labels in some card gaps. The acceptance model was too optimistic because it relied on estimated label clearance instead of eliminating fragile primary-flow edge labels. Follow-up issue: diag-20260607-canvas-primary-flow-edge-labels-still-obstructed.

issues.title: Canvas 主流程边标签仍被卡片遮挡
issues.failure_packet: 用户再次截图指出问题仍未解决：系统闭环图内部两个单元之间的连线文字仍被相邻卡片遮挡。上一轮通过拉开间距和估算边标签宽度让 audit-canvas-visual -Strict 通过，但 Obsidian 实际渲染仍会把主流程边标签压在卡片下面。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 截图 -> 系统闭环图主流程边标签如 inspect modules / must cover / status + gaps 仍被卡片覆盖 -> 当前扫描发现 current/active 图中仍有大量非 bridge 主流程边标签 -> 问题不是单个 label 宽度估算，而是 primary flow edge label 这种视觉形式本身在 Obsidian Canvas 中脆弱。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1：从局部遮挡追溯到视觉语言层，不再只调坐标。原则 2：协同升级需要迁移所有 current/active 图中的同类主流程标签，并同步 Canvas policy、visual audit、review 记录和诊断记录。原则 3：Canvas 作为可视化影子，主流程语义应由卡片编号、标题、分区和空间顺序表达，不能依赖容易被遮挡的边标签。
issues.failed_mindset: estimated-clearance acceptance：把脚本估算的可用像素当作视觉验收，而没有尊重 Obsidian 实际渲染层级；同时保留了太多低价值主流程边标签。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 主流程边标签在 Obsidian Canvas 中会被相邻节点覆盖或裁切；上一轮校验只要求估算净空足够，没有把“primary flow edges should be unlabeled by default”升级为正向模型。
issues.positive_model_repair: 将 current/active 结构图的主流程边改为默认无标签；流程语义放入编号卡片、标题和空间顺序。保留边标签只用于 bridge-* 的“对应：...”解释线或极少数局部异常，并由 visual audit 拦截非 bridge 主流程标签。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。用户已经两次指出同类视觉遮挡，说明单靠估算净空不足；current/active 图中的非 bridge 主流程边标签应作为默认禁用模式，除非未来有明确例外登记。

validation.note: Current/active Canvas scan found no non-bridge primary-flow edge labels. Strict visual audit passed with 0 warnings.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The prior repair was insufficient because it tried to make primary-flow edge labels fit; this repair removes the fragile visual form entirely. All current/active non-bridge primary-flow edge labels were removed, the visual audit now warns on any future non-bridge labeled primary-flow edge, Canvas/review policy was updated, and full validation passed.

issues.title: Canvas 支撑文件节点只有文件名缺少人读解读
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出部分 Canvas 文件块只有文件名称，没有解释该文件在当前图里的作用，可读性较差。截图位于领域分类图顶部支撑文件区，包含 domain-taxonomy.registry.json、domain-taxonomy-routing-guide、domain-taxonomy-overview 和 taxonomy-routing-audit 等文件节点。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 截图 -> 定位到 domain-taxonomy-overview.canvas 非导航 file nodes -> 扫描 current/active Canvas 发现系统总览、Canvas 子系统、诊断、闭环、领域分类、三级矩阵和审查图均存在非导航支撑文件节点只显示文件名 -> validate-canvas 与 audit-canvas-visual -Strict 旧版本均通过，因为旧规则只要求 navigation_nodes 配 nav-label-*，没有要求支撑文件配 file-label-*。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1：从截图现象追溯到视觉规则缺口，而不是只给截图中的四个文件改名。原则 2：系统升级必须协同，需要迁移所有 current/active 画布资产，并同步 Canvas 规则、review criteria、视觉审查脚本、诊断记录和人读说明。原则 3：Canvas 是文件系统和系统结构的可视化影子，文件节点不能只暴露路径或文件名，必须让用户知道该文件承担 registry、schema、validator、状态、索引、workflow 还是说明入口。
issues.failed_mindset: filename-as-explanation thinking：把文件名当成人读解读，忽略了 Canvas 的作用是降低认知成本，而不是把文件系统原样搬到画布上。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas 视觉质量模型只覆盖导航文件节点的 nav-label-* 和线条几何审查，没有把非导航支撑文件节点的角色解释作为一等视觉对象。
issues.positive_model_repair: 将非导航支撑文件改为一体化支撑文件卡：file-label-* 是可读主体卡，内部写明文件角色；file node 缩成嵌入式点击按钮，只负责 Obsidian 打开文件。已为 current/active Canvas 图迁移该样式。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要视觉审查 gate。该问题会在新增机器真相文件、schema、validator、状态文件或人读说明入口时反复出现；audit-canvas-visual -Strict 现在会提示缺少 file-label-* 的支撑文件节点。

validation.note: All current/active non-navigation support files now use file-label-* as integrated readable cards with compact embedded file buttons. Strict Canvas visual audit passes with 0 warnings after the new gate.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted after follow-up correction. The repair did not leave separate label strips above file blocks: it migrated all current/active Canvas support files into integrated file-label-* readable cards with compact embedded file buttons, added strict visual-audit checks for missing labels or oversized support file nodes, updated Canvas/review policy and human docs, and passed full system validation.

issues.title: L0 入口图按主观栏目分组，未表达真实内容层级归属
issues.failure_packet: 用户截图指出：现在不是格式问题，而是内容层级归属、整理和关联关系问题。当前 kb-navigation-index.canvas 用“理解系统 / 治理质量”两列组织入口，把 L1 系统总览、L1 知识内容、L2 Canvas 子系统和 L2 治理子系统混进主观栏目，无法让用户从入口判断每张图属于哪一层。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 截图 -> 定位到 30-maps/canvas/00-entry/kb-navigation-index.canvas -> 入口图是 L0 visual-navigation-index，子视图在 canvas-registry / canvas-view-graph 中分别登记为 system-overview、knowledge-content 和 system-subsystem -> 入口画布文本没有暴露这些登记层级，只按“理解系统 / 治理质量”分组 -> validate-canvas 旧规则只检查跳转文件、nav-label 和纯导航边，未检查入口标签是否暴露目标 view_level。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1：从局部截图追溯到入口信息架构模型，不把它当作排版问题。原则 2：入口语义升级会影响 Canvas 资产、Canvas policy、review criteria、validate-canvas 和诊断队列，必须协同更新。原则 3：Canvas 是文件系统和 registry 的可视化影子，L0 入口也要投影机器登记的 view_level / layer / primary_subject，而不是另造一套模糊人读分类。
issues.failed_mindset: format-first entry design：把 L0 入口当作好看的按钮面板，只要求分组、紧凑和可点击，却没有让分组服从机器登记的内容层级和归属边界。
issues.immediate_root_cause: Canvas navigation_index_layout 的正向模型停在 grouped destination selector，没有要求 L0 入口按 registry 的 view_level、layer、primary_subject 暴露层级归属；validate-canvas 也未要求 L0 nav-label 包含目标 view_level。
issues.positive_model_repair: 将 L0 entry 从“分组按钮面板”升级为“层级感知路由图”：按主线入口、知识内容层、可视化系统层、治理闭环层组织；每个 nav-label 显示目标 L1/L2 与归属；文件节点仍只做 Obsidian 点击按钮，不表达结构流。
issues.constraint_decision: 使用小型硬校验加审查准则。validate-canvas 现在要求 L0 nav-label 暴露目标 view_level，这是稳定可机器检查的不变量；更细的内容归属分组需要视觉/信息架构审查，因为它依赖 primary_subject 语义判断，不能完全靠脚本替代。

validation.note: L0 entry canvas now exposes L1/L2 ownership in nav-label cards; validate-canvas includes a target view_level check for navigation-index labels.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted. The fix addresses the original content-hierarchy problem rather than only formatting: the entry canvas now mirrors registered view levels and ownership layers, Canvas/review policy names this as an entry information-architecture rule, validate-canvas catches missing target view_level in future L0 labels, and diagnostics captured the recurring failure mode.

issues.title: 系统内部缺少统一模块分层模型，导致入口图和模块归属漂移
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出：这不是单个图的问题，而是说明内部整个系统模块分层混乱。上一轮修了 L0 入口图，但更深层证据显示 information-map、system-closure-map、Canvas view_level/layer 和 module-governance-policy 各自有分层口径，缺少一个统一的模块职责归属机器真相。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 用户反馈 -> 检查 information-map 发现模块列表只有边界和路径，没有 owner_layer/module_kind；检查 system-closure-map 发现 owner_layer 存在但由闭环表局部维护；检查 module-governance-policy 发现 layers 是流程说明；检查 Canvas registry 发现 view_level/layer 是视图层级而非模块职责层 -> 三套轴混用导致 entry 图只能用主观分组补位。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从单图问题上溯到系统层；原则 2 要求协同更新 route、information-map、closure、Canvas、review、diagnostics、validator 和 docs；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，模块分层必须有机器可读真相，不能靠 Canvas 文本或 Markdown 解释。
issues.failed_mindset: view-layer-as-module-layer thinking：把 Canvas 的 L0/L1/L2 视图缩放层、目录存放层和模块职责层混成一个概念，导致每个系统表面都在临时解释“它属于哪一层”。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统没有 canonical module-layer model。模块职责归属被分散在 module-governance-policy 的人读层级、system-closure-map 的 owner_layer、Canvas registry 的 view_level/layer 和入口图视觉分组里，缺少单一机器真相和一致性校验。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增 system/module-layer-model.json 作为稳定模块 owner_layer/module_kind 的机器真相；将 owner_layer/module_kind 投影进 information-map；让 system-closure-map owner_layer 对齐该模型；更新 module-governance-policy、route-registry、Canvas registry/view graph、系统总览图和审查准则；validate-system 增加跨文件一致性校验。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。模块分层是系统长期增长的核心不变量，漂移会反复污染入口图、闭环表、可视化、审查和新增模块决策；validate-system 现在检查 module-layer-model 与 information-map / system-closure-map / module-governance-policy 的一致性。

validation.note: validate-system now checks module-layer-model, information-map owner_layer/module_kind, system-closure owner_layer and module-governance layer alignment.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted after validation. The repair resolves the systemic layer drift rather than only redrawing one Canvas: module responsibility now has a canonical machine truth, all stable modules have assignments, information-map and closure-map are checked against it, Canvas entry/system overview point back to it, and review/diagnostic rules capture the recurrence pattern.

issues.title: 系统模块分层仍缺少专业结构治理模块，导致新模块归属和新分支判断无法闭环
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出当前归类分层仍不行，并要求安排一个专业模块负责后续新增模块内容的归属、扩展维护系统各模块之间关系，以及判断归入现有模块还是新建分支。表面问题是分层结果不好，深层问题是系统只有静态 module-layer-model，没有负责结构判断的长期模块。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查当前机器真相：module-layer-model 只保存 owner_layer/module_kind 快照；module-governance-policy 管登记契约但不维护模块拓扑；information-map 有数据流但没有分支决策流程；system-closure-map 只记录闭环状态；Canvas 入口只能投影已有判断，不能作为判断源。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从“分类不满意”追溯到缺少上游判断能力；原则 2 要求协同升级 route、information-map、closure、Canvas、review、diagnostics 和 validator；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，因此模块关系和分支判断必须进入 JSON 拓扑，而不是依赖聊天或 Markdown。
issues.failed_mindset: static-layer-table-as-governance：把一次性的分层表误当成长期结构治理能力，导致新模块出现时缺少专业判断入口。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统缺少 system-structure-governance 这样的专业模块来维护模块拓扑、关系类型、分支归属和新模块接入决策。module-layer-model 是必要快照，但不能独自承担“归属还是新建分支”的判断。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增 system/system-structure-governance.json 作为结构判断契约，新增 system/module-relationship-map.json 保存模块拓扑与分支决策；将 module-layer-model 改为派生快照；同步 information-map、route-registry、module-governance-policy、system-closure-map、visual-coverage-map、Canvas registry/view graph、入口图、系统总览图、专属结构治理图、review 准则和 validate-system 校验。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验，但校验保护的是正向拓扑模型：information-map、module-relationship-map、module-layer-model 和 system-closure-map 必须覆盖同一组稳定模块；关系边必须指向已登记模块；分支归属必须与 owner_layer 快照一致。

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after adding system-structure-governance, module-relationship-map and topology consistency checks.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when system-structure-governance exists as a stable module, module-relationship-map validates against information-map and module-layer-model, route/closure/coverage/review/diagnostics are synchronized, dedicated Canvas is registered and full validation passes.

post_acceptance_correction.note: Initial acceptance was incomplete because it proved registration, synchronization and visual coverage, but did not require closure-map activation_proof showing legacy responsibility was actually accepted.

issues.title: 新增系统模块缺少旧内容责任继承原则，可能只接管未来内容而放任旧资产游离
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出新的系统模块需要对旧的系统内容负责，这是顶级原则之一。当前系统已有新增模块归属和结构治理原则，但没有把“新模块必须继承旧内容责任”提升为顶级原则和新模块契约。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 development-principles、module-governance-policy、system-structure-governance 和 diagnostic-system：已有 coordinated upgrade、existing_asset_migrations 和 structure decision，但缺少明确 legacy_scope、legacy_asset_audit、legacy_asset_action 和“不能只管未来内容”的顶级原则。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 要求从用户指出的风险追溯到治理缺口；原则 2 要求新增原则后同步模块治理、结构治理、诊断、审查、路由、Canvas 和校验；原则 3 要求机器友好数据流，因此旧资产继承不能只写在人类说明中。
issues.failed_mindset: future-only-module-thinking：把新模块看成未来入口，而不是会接管一个完整责任边界的治理主体。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统缺少新系统模块对既有资产的继承责任原则与契约字段，导致新模块可能只登记未来内容，旧文件、旧图、旧路由和旧状态继续漂移。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增顶级原则 new-system-modules-inherit-legacy-responsibility；模块治理契约增加 legacy_scope、legacy_asset_audit、legacy_asset_action；系统结构治理流程增加 audit-existing-governed-assets；诊断 system_upgrade 验收要求旧资产 adopt/migrate/deprecate/archive/exempt/queue；审查和 Canvas 质量门同步检查旧资产责任。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要轻量硬校验。validate-system 检查顶级原则存在、新模块契约包含旧资产字段、system-structure-governance 有 legacy_asset_policy 和 audit-existing-governed-assets 工作流，避免原则只停留在聊天或 Markdown。

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after adding legacy responsibility gates.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when the principle is visible in top-level instructions, machine principles, module governance contract, structure governance workflow, diagnostic upgrade acceptance, review criteria, route gate, Canvas projection and validate-system hard checks.

issues.title: 系统结构治理模块生效后，现有分层关系缺少显式审查记录
issues.failure_packet: 用户追问分区/结构治理模块是否已经对现有分层关系做审查。检查发现 validate-system 已经完成跨表一致性校验，system-closure-map 也有 latest_module_layer_audit，但 system-structure-governance 自己的 module-relationship-map 中没有显式 current_layer_relationship_audit。
issues.lower_evidence_track: route/information-map/module-layer-model/system-closure-map/module-relationship-map 对比：19 个 information modules、19 个 layer assignments、19 个 closure modules、19 个 topology modules 已对齐；但 module-relationship-map_has_audit_section=false，缺少由结构治理模块保存的旧分层关系审查记录。
issues.upper_principle_track: 新顶级原则要求新系统模块对旧内容负责；system-structure-governance 既然成为模块拓扑 owner，就必须显式审查并接管旧的分层关系，而不能只依赖校验通过。
issues.failed_mindset: validation-as-audit thinking：把跨文件一致性校验当成结构治理模块自己的旧关系审查记录。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 旧分层关系的 adopt/migrate/archive 等动作没有写入 module-relationship-map 的结构化审查区，导致用户无法从结构治理模块本身看到现有关系是否已被接管。
issues.positive_model_repair: 在 system/module-relationship-map.json 增加 current_layer_relationship_audit，记录审查范围、方法、模块覆盖、分支对齐、关系边审查、旧资产接管动作和验收；在 system-structure-governance 与 system-closure-map 中登记最新审查指针。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要轻量硬校验。validate-system 应要求 module-relationship-map 拥有 current_layer_relationship_audit，并检查其基本字段，避免结构治理模块只声明流程但没有审查当前旧关系。

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after adding current_layer_relationship_audit validation.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when module-relationship-map contains current_layer_relationship_audit, structure-governance points to it, closure map records the latest module relationship audit, and validate-system/validate-diagnostics pass.

issues.title: System module was called active before activation proof existed
issues.failure_packet: The user pointed out that the structure-governance module had not explicitly proved that it reviewed and took responsibility for existing layer relationships. The deeper failure was that the system could treat registration, synchronization and Canvas coverage as module activation before closure-map activation_proof existed.
issues.lower_evidence_track: system-structure-governance had route, information-map, closure, visual coverage and current_layer_relationship_audit records, but module-governance-policy had no module_activation_contract, system-closure-map had no activation_proof for system-structure-governance, and validate-system did not check whether a module may be called active/effective.
issues.upper_principle_track: New system modules must inherit responsibility for existing system content; coordinated upgrades must update affected surfaces; positive model repair should come before negative constraints. Therefore active/effective status requires machine-readable proof that legacy assets were audited and accepted.
issues.failed_mindset: registration-as-activation thinking: treating routes, maps, Canvas and validation registration as enough evidence that the module had already taken responsibility.
issues.immediate_root_cause: The system lacked a module activation contract and an activation_proof gate, so legacy responsibility was not a hard prerequisite for calling a system module active.
issues.positive_model_repair: Add module_activation_contract, add activation_proof for system-structure-governance in system-closure-map, add prove-module-activation to the structure workflow, and make diagnostics, review, route gates and validate-system treat activation_proof as the prerequisite for active/effective claims.
issues.constraint_decision: A hard validation gate is needed because the recurrence risk is high: future system modules could otherwise be registered without taking responsibility for historical assets. validate-system must check activation_proof for module_activation_contract.current_required_modules.

validation.note: Updated to pass after activation contract, proof, canvas and validator changes are applied.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted only when module-governance has module_activation_contract, system-closure-map has system-structure-governance activation_proof, structure-governance points to the proof, route/review/diagnostics know the gate, Canvas shows activation in the workflow, and validations pass.

issues.title: L0 entry and view graph flattened L2 system subsystems as peers of the system overview
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出 Canvas 子系统显然是系统内容的一部分，却在入口图中和系统总览并列，其他诊断、审查、闭环、结构治理子系统也有同类问题。
issues.lower_evidence_track: canvas-registry marked these maps as layer=system-subsystem and view_level=L2, but kb-navigation-index.child_views and canvas-view-graph parent_view_ids attached them directly to L0 kb-navigation-index. Their own Canvas navigation also used 返回：总导航入口 instead of 返回：系统总览.
issues.upper_principle_track: 信息地图与机器友好数据流要求层级边界清晰；Canvas 是文件系统和系统结构的可视化影子；L0/L1/L2 是视觉缩放层级，不应把 L2 子系统画成 L1 系统总览的同级。
issues.failed_mindset: shortcut-as-parent thinking：把入口快捷按钮当成真实父子关系，导致导航方便性覆盖了结构层级。
issues.immediate_root_cause: L0 entry rule only要求暴露 view_level/layer，但没有规定 L2 system-subsystem 的 canonical parent 必须是 L1 system overview，也没有校验 L0 child_views 只能承载 L1 主干。
issues.positive_model_repair: 建立 L0 -> L1 主干 -> L2 系统子系统的视图父子模型：L0 只把系统总览和知识领域分类作为 child_views；Canvas、诊断、审查、闭环、结构治理作为系统总览的 child_views；L0 可以保留 L2 快捷按钮，但视觉上必须嵌套在系统总览下。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。validate-canvas 必须拒绝 current/active L0 navigation child_views 指向非 L1 视图，并拒绝 current/active L2 system-subsystem 直接 parent 到 L0。

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after parentage and entry Canvas repair; audit-canvas-visual.ps1 was executed with -Strict.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when L0 child_views contain only L1 trunk views, L2 system-subsystem views parent to the L1 system overview, subsystem Canvas files return to system overview, entry visual layout nests L2 shortcuts under system overview, and validators enforce the model.

issues.title: 诊断模块缺少自我审计契约，导致用户纠正后只修目标问题不反查漏诊原因
issues.failure_packet: 用户追问“诊断模块失职根因”。前序问题中，activation_proof 缺失和 L0 入口父子层级扁平化都由用户指出后才被补诊。诊断模块记录了目标问题，但没有自动把“为什么诊断过程没提前发现”纳入自己的责任闭环。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 diagnostic-system.json：已有 failure packet、证据链、owner、positive_model_repair、visual projection sync 和 acceptance；但没有 self_audit_policy，也没有 audit-diagnostic-performance 工作流。validate-diagnostics 只检查记录完整性和路径存在，不会要求诊断模块在被用户纠正时审计自身漏诊机制。
issues.upper_principle_track: “遇到问题先诊断”同样适用于诊断模块自身；“系统升级必须协同”要求修复目标问题时也审查造成漏诊的流程、contract、gate 和 review 准则；“信息地图与机器友好数据流”要求自审结果进入机器记录，而不是停留在聊天解释。
issues.failed_mindset: target-only diagnosis thinking：把被指出的对象当成唯一故障面，修完目标对象就结束，没有把用户纠正视为诊断流程自身失败的证据。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 诊断模块缺少“用户纠正/漏诊/误判/提前闭环”触发的 diagnostic_self_audit 契约；诊断接受偏向验证目标修复结果，而不是验证诊断过程是否也被修复。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增 diagnostic self-audit 正向模型：用户指出诊断失职时，诊断模块必须把自己列为受影响面，记录 diagnostic_self_audit，说明漏掉的模式、漏掉的层、修正契约和复发门；同时更新诊断 workflow、schema、route、review 和诊断 Canvas。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。validate-diagnostics 必须检查 diagnostic-system 拥有 self_audit_policy，并要求 owning_repair_layer 包含 diagnostic-system 的 captured issue 必须带 diagnostic_self_audit。

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after adding diagnostic self-audit policy and validator checks.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when diagnostic-system has self_audit_policy and audit-diagnostic-performance workflow, schema allows diagnostic_self_audit, this issue records diagnostic_self_audit, validate-diagnostics enforces it, review/route/Canvas surfaces know the rule, and full validation passes.

diagnostic_self_audit.trigger: User explicitly asked for the root cause of diagnostic module failure after repeated higher-layer corrections were needed.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_issue_pattern: Diagnostics repaired target artifacts but did not automatically diagnose its own missed coverage after user correction.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_layer: diagnostic workflow and diagnostic validation contract
diagnostic_self_audit.corrective_contract: Add self_audit_policy plus audit-diagnostic-performance workflow and diagnostic_self_audit issue field.
diagnostic_self_audit.recurrence_gate: validate-diagnostics requires diagnostic_self_audit for captured issues owned by diagnostic-system.

issues.title: 系统升级缺少同类面扫描契约，导致问题被压窄成单模块修补
issues.failure_packet: 用户纠正“不只是这个子系统，要全面考虑”。前序修复把诊断失职压窄为 diagnostic-system self-audit，但用户指出问题本身跨越诊断、审查、Canvas、结构治理、路由、schema 和校验闭环。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 从具体现象往上追：L0 入口层级错误、activation_proof 缺失、诊断 self-audit 缺失都由用户指出后才补；diagnostic-system.json 有 affected_surfaces 和 migrate-governed-assets，但没有 scan-same-class-and-sibling-surfaces；issue schema 和 validate-diagnostics 不要求 generalization_scan；review-system 只检查若干已知缺口，不要求同类面扫描。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 1 的自下而上不是只追到一个模块，而是从具体故障抽象出 failure class 后检查同类资产；原则 2 要求系统升级协同，受影响面包括兄弟模块、同类图、route、schema、validator、review 和视觉投影；原则 3 要求这个扫描结果进入机器友好记录，而不是停留在聊天解释。
issues.failed_mindset: single-target repair thinking：把用户点名的子系统当成问题边界，把 affected_surfaces 当成文件清单，而不是把故障类泛化到同层/同类/兄弟面。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统缺少统一的 same-class impact scan 契约：诊断流程、issue schema、route gate、review gate 和 validator 都没有强制 system_upgrade 在关闭前记录同类资产与兄弟面的扫描结果。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增“同类面扫描”正向模型：先自下而上确认 observed instance 和 failure_class，再扫描 same-class assets、sibling surfaces、affected modules、exemptions 与 recurrence gate；诊断负责触发并记录，审查负责发现漏扫，validator 负责拒绝新 system_upgrade 无 generalization_scan。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。这个问题已经多次由用户指出，且会静默复发；validate-diagnostics 必须要求从本 issue 起 captured system_upgrade 带 generalization_scan。

generalization_scan.observed_instance: The repair scope was narrowed to diagnostic self-audit after the user pointed out a broader cross-system failure.
generalization_scan.failure_class: system_upgrade closure without same-class and sibling-surface impact scan
exemptions: Earlier captured diagnostic issues remain historical records before this effective issue; future system_upgrade issues must include generalization_scan.
generalization_scan.recurrence_gate: validate-diagnostics fails captured system_upgrade issues at or after diag-20260607-system-wide-generalization-scan-missing when generalization_scan is missing.

validation.note: Final validation is rerun after same-class impact scan contract and validator are installed.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when diagnostics has same-class impact scan policy and workflow step, schema supports generalization_scan, route/review/development principles know the rule, diagnostic Canvas reflects it, and validate-diagnostics enforces the new contract from this issue onward.

diagnostic_self_audit.trigger: User corrected the scope: the problem was broader than diagnostic-system self-audit and should be treated as cross-system.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_issue_pattern: Diagnostics localized a systemic failure into a single subsystem repair instead of extracting and scanning the failure class across sibling surfaces.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_layer: cross-module system_upgrade closure contract and validator
diagnostic_self_audit.corrective_contract: Add generalization_scan_policy, scan-same-class-and-sibling-surfaces workflow step, generalization_scan schema field, route/review gates and validator enforcement.
diagnostic_self_audit.recurrence_gate: validate-diagnostics requires captured system_upgrade issues from this issue onward to contain generalization_scan.

issues.title: 信息地图缺少独立模块身份，导致根地图记录别人但没有自我闭环
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出需要参考其他项目的信息地图设定，并要求把信息地图作为独立系统模块。现有 system/information-map.json 已经是系统入口，但它没有被登记为 system-information-map 模块，也没有 manifest、shard、schema、专属 Canvas、activation_proof 和 manifest 校验。
issues.lower_evidence_track: 检查 system/information-map.json、module-layer-model、module-relationship-map、system-closure-map 和 visual-coverage-map：19 个模块中没有 system-information-map；route-registry 也没有信息地图专属路由；validate-system 只校验根 information-map 与其他登记面一致，不校验 manifest/shard。对比 lumiwriter 项目，存在 information_maps manifest、shards、schemas 和测试。
issues.upper_principle_track: 原则 3 要求维护 information map 和机器友好数据流；原则 2 要求系统升级必须协同更新 route、schema、dataflow、gate、workflow、tool map、memory/记录和可视化；新增系统模块必须对旧资产负责，因此已有根 information-map 必须被新模块接管，而不是只管未来文件。
issues.failed_mindset: self-description blind spot：把 information-map 当作一个文件入口，而不是一个需要独立 owner、读取策略、分片、schema、闭环和可视化影子的系统模块。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 系统缺少 system-information-map 模块身份与 activation contract；根地图没有 manifest/shard 轻量读取层，也没有专属 route、closure、topology、visual coverage 和 validator gate。
issues.positive_model_repair: 新增 system-information-map 模块：接管 system/information-map.json，补 information-map-manifest、information-map-shards、information-map schemas、docs、专属 Canvas，并同步 route、module layer、relationship map、closure activation proof、visual coverage、canvas registry/view graph、tool map 和 validate-system manifest/shard gate。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。以后 manifest/shard 不能只作为文件存在；validate-system 必须检查 manifest owner、source map、shard refs、entry refs、schema refs 和路径存在。

generalization_scan.observed_instance: The root information map existed but had no standalone module identity or self-description closure.

technical-documentation already has docs map and route

issues.title: 诊断记录缺少事故表现与根因问题分离契约，可能把表面事故补丁当成系统修复
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出“事故是问题的体现，但不是问题本身”，要求深度诊断定位根因问题，再反馈给调节修复升级相关规则，而不是针对特定事故表面加修复型规则。检查发现系统已有 failure_packet、failure_class、positive_model_repair 和 generalization_scan，但没有硬性字段区分 incident manifestation、root_problem 和 system_regulation_target。

incident_manifestation.observed_incident: 系统可能在看到某个事故表象后，直接新增表面规则或修复被点名对象，而没有证明事故背后的根因问题和调节目标。
incident_manifestation.why_it_is_not_root_problem: 事故表象只能说明系统某处失效；它不能自动说明失效机制、责任模型或应该升级的规则面。

issues.lower_evidence_track: diagnostic-system 已有 name-symptom、failure_packet、lower_evidence_track、failed_mindset、immediate_root_cause、positive_model_repair、constraint_decision 和 generalization_scan_policy；validate-diagnostics 会强制 generalization_scan，但不会强制新 system_upgrade 记录说明“事故为什么不是根因问题”、root_problem 的 recurrence_mechanism 或系统调节目标。
issues.upper_principle_track: 遇到问题先诊断要求从局部现象上溯；正向模型优先要求先修产生问题的机制；同类面扫描要求抽象 failure_class。用户这次指出的是更高层：事故只是证据入口，根因问题才是修复对象，调节目标才是规则更新落点。
issues.failed_mindset: incident-as-problem thinking：把可见事故、截图、单文件异常或用户点名对象当成问题本身，导致规则更新围绕事故表面而不是复发机制。
issues.immediate_root_cause: 诊断记录契约缺少 incident_manifestation/root_problem/system_regulation_target 三段式字段，validator 不能拒绝把事故表述伪装成根因问题的 system_upgrade。

root_problem.problem_statement: 诊断系统没有硬性区分事故表现、根因问题和系统调节目标。
root_problem.recurrence_mechanism: 未来 agent 可以在 system_upgrade 中记录 failure_packet 和 immediate_root_cause，但仍把一个事故表面或单个对象修复当成根因级修复。
root_problem.owning_system_model: diagnostic issue record contract and diagnostic validation policy

issues.positive_model_repair: 新增 incident-root-problem separation 正向模型：诊断流程在 name-symptom 后必须分离 incident_manifestation、root_problem 和 system_regulation_target；schema 支持三段字段；queue execution policy 和 validate-diagnostics 从本 issue 起强制新 captured system_upgrade 填写；route/review/doc/Canvas 同步认知。
issues.constraint_decision: 需要硬校验。这个问题会静默复发，且会污染系统规则质量；validate-diagnostics 必须阻止新的 captured system_upgrade 缺少事故-根因-调节目标三段字段。

issues.title: skill 和模块入口薄层规则没有成为全系统可校验契约，导致入口文档重新承载模块细节
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出 skill 文档也要和 AGENTS.md 一样薄层留路由、分层治理，只有一般性的顶层原则才能流入其中，而且这个规则不只适用于根文件，每个模块内部也要遵守。检查发现 diagnostic-system 与 review-system 的 SKILL.md 仍包含 Workflow 和 Output 模板，说明薄入口原则没有被可校验地落实到 skill 和模块内部入口。

incident_manifestation.observed_incident: 两个本地 SKILL.md 声称自己是 thin entrypoint，但继续承载 workflow 步骤和输出字段模板。
incident_manifestation.why_it_is_not_root_problem: 厚 skill 只是规则漂移的表现；真正问题是薄入口没有成为统一的机器契约和校验门，模块内部入口也没有被同等治理。

issues.lower_evidence_track: route-registry 已有 no-agent-doc-bloat，module-governance 已有 thin-entry-fat-route 和 subsystem-thin-baseline-docs，但 validate-system 不检查 .agents/skills；本地 diagnostic/review skill 仍可增长出 Workflow/Output 细节而不被拦截。
issues.upper_principle_track: 信息地图与机器友好数据流要求 Markdown 不作为系统行为真相来源；系统升级必须协同要求规则、route、review、tool map 和既有资产一起更新；新增或升级模块必须对旧内容负责要求当前已有 skill 也被接管。
issues.failed_mindset: entrypoint-as-method-carrier：把方便触发的入口文件当成局部方法承载处，导致机器路由和真实执行契约分裂。
issues.immediate_root_cause: module-governance 没有独立 thin_entrypoint_policy，route/review/tool/validator 没有把 skill、baseline doc、child-agent doc 和 subsystem README 作为同一类 entrypoint 漂移面处理。

root_problem.recurrence_mechanism: 未来任何模块新增 skill、README、baseline_doc 或子 agent 文档时，都可能因为没有硬性路由契约而把 workflow、schema、输出模板和局部方法继续写进入口。

issues.title: Terminal output mojibake was not separated from file-content encoding integrity
issues.failure_packet: The user reported many garbled file contents. Direct PowerShell Get-Content output looked garbled, but byte-level Node checks showed the inspected files were valid UTF-8 and contained correct Chinese code points. The system lacked an explicit diagnostic distinction between display-layer mojibake and real file-content corruption.

incident_manifestation.observed_incident: PowerShell output rendered Chinese Markdown and JSON text as mojibake-looking strings while UTF-8 byte checks showed clean file content.
incident_manifestation.why_it_is_not_root_problem: The visible garbling is an incident at the terminal/display boundary; it does not by itself prove repository file corruption.

issues.lower_evidence_track: Scanned 191 text files as UTF-8 with byte round-trip checks: invalidUtf8Count=0. Target Chinese strings such as fault diagnosis and diagnose before fixing were found as correct Unicode code points. PowerShell environment showed version 5.1, Console OutputEncoding=utf-8, OutputEncoding=us-ascii and active code page 936.
issues.upper_principle_track: Diagnose-before-fixing requires separating local symptom from owning layer. Information-map and machine-friendly flow require machine-readable file truth, while technical documentation owns terminal/runtime display behavior.
issues.failed_mindset: display-output-as-file-truth: treating mojibake-looking terminal output as proof that repository files are corrupted.
issues.immediate_root_cause: validate-system checked only a narrow set of text corruption markers and did not cover raw Markdown/script/canvas text or likely UTF-8/GBK mojibake patterns; troubleshooting docs did not explain the display-layer vs file-layer distinction.

root_problem.problem_statement: The system lacked a durable distinction and validation path for file-content encoding integrity versus terminal output encoding display errors.
root_problem.recurrence_mechanism: Future sessions could see garbled PowerShell output, misdiagnose it as file corruption, and either over-repair clean files or miss a real encoding problem.
root_problem.owning_system_model: technical documentation plus validate-system text integrity gate

issues.positive_model_repair: Set PowerShell validation scripts to UTF-8 output, expand validate-system raw text integrity scanning across docs, skills, scripts, maps and indexes, add likely mojibake pattern checks, and document the file-layer/display-layer diagnosis path in troubleshooting docs.
issues.constraint_decision: A validation gate is justified because actual text corruption can silently damage machine-readable truth, while display-layer false positives can cause broad unnecessary repairs.

system_regulation_target.update_mode: add text integrity checks and technical troubleshooting guidance without rewriting clean UTF-8 content
system_regulation_target.acceptance_gate: validate-system passes after scanning raw text surfaces, and byte-level checks still report invalidUtf8Count=0 for repository text files

generalization_scan.observed_instance: The user noted that files modified in the previous response also appeared garbled, so the audit loop checked those files one by one and then scanned all repository text files.
generalization_scan.failure_class: terminal output encoding confusion versus repository text integrity

all repository text files covered by audit-text-integrity default roots
sibling_surfaces_checked: PowerShell output encoding settings across scripts
exemptions: No repository text rewrite was needed because scanned files were valid UTF-8 and inspected Chinese strings had correct Unicode code points.

validation.note: Validation is rerun after script, route, tool and doc updates.

issues.diagnosis_acceptance: Accepted when the file-by-file audit report shows checked_count=193, failed_count=0, status=pass; validate-system, validate-diagnostics, validate-reviews, build-index and validate-kb pass; and the diagnostic record links the reusable audit script and report.

diagnostic_self_audit.trigger: The user challenged the diagnosis by reporting visible garbling in files, requiring diagnostics to separate display-layer evidence from file-content truth.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_issue_pattern: Initial scans looked only for replacement characters, question placeholders and a small marker set, and could have under-modeled terminal output mojibake as a separate evidence layer.
diagnostic_self_audit.missed_layer: technical runtime/output boundary between PowerShell display encoding and repository UTF-8 file content
diagnostic_self_audit.corrective_contract: Future encoding diagnostics must first run byte-level UTF-8 round-trip checks and then inspect terminal OutputEncoding/chcp before claiming file corruption.
diagnostic_self_audit.recurrence_gate: validate-system scans broader raw text surfaces and troubleshooting docs record the file-layer/display-layer check path.

issues.title: loop 编排被低估为单一 taxonomy refinement 附属资产，缺少系统级模块生效闭环
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出 loop 模块也算系统的大模块，未来会参与各种循环。检查发现 loop-orchestration 虽已在信息地图、分层和闭环里出现，但可视化仍共享在 domain-taxonomy-overview，路由只读取 taxonomy-refinement 资产，闭环状态为 partial，缺少 dedicated Canvas、activation proof 和旧 loop 接管证明。

incident_manifestation.observed_incident: loop-orchestration 已登记但仍像 taxonomy-refinement 的附属入口：route 只读单一 loop，visual coverage 是 shared_required，closure 为 partial。
incident_manifestation.why_it_is_not_root_problem: 缺一张 loop 图只是表象；真正问题是 durable loop 的系统身份、旧资产接管和跨模块 handoff 模型没有完成升格。

issues.lower_evidence_track: Existing registry had only taxonomy-refinement; route validation only ran validate-system; visual coverage declared shared_required through domain taxonomy; closure known_gaps treated generic loop orchestration as a future runner issue rather than a module identity issue.
issues.upper_principle_track: 系统升级必须协同；信息地图与机器友好数据流；新系统模块必须对旧内容负责；登记不等于生效，稳定模块需要 activation_proof。
issues.failed_mindset: single-instance-loop-thinking：因为当前只有 taxonomy-refinement，就把 loop 系统理解成一个具体循环的状态文件，而不是未来各种持续循环的系统治理模块。
issues.immediate_root_cause: loop-orchestration 的 positive module model 没有写入 registry/route/closure/visual coverage/activation proof，导致它虽然有名字但没有系统级生效证明。

root_problem.problem_statement: durable loop 缺少系统级编排模块模型和生效闭环。
root_problem.recurrence_mechanism: 未来新增 review、diagnostics、知识质量或运维循环时，可能继续作为某个局部模块的临时文件出现，而不是进入统一 loop registry、状态契约、可视化覆盖和闭环证明。
root_problem.owning_system_model: loop-orchestration module model, module activation contract and visual coverage governance

issues.title: L0 可视化入口把领域分类抬成系统同级，导致顶层认知偏离系统优先模型
issues.failure_packet: 用户指出项目最上层是系统以及知识库相关 agent，分类只是其中一部分。检查发现机器模块分层中 domain-maps 已属于 knowledge-content，但 Canvas L0 入口把 domain-taxonomy-overview-map 和 knowledge-base-system-architecture-map 并列为 child view，造成视觉入口层级高于机器归属。

incident_manifestation.why_it_is_not_root_problem: 问题不是单张图的排版，而是可视化父子层级没有跟随系统优先的模块模型，导致分类被视觉上抬成系统同级。
